summary: Proved soundness and completeness for modal logic D4 (KD4) over serial + transitive Kripke frames. Created D4Soundness.lean (d4_axiom_sound, d4_soundness, d4_soundness_derivable) and D4Completeness.lean (d4_completeness using truth_lemma_d for D-specific completeness). Updated Metalogic.lean module aggregator. All infrastructure was already in place from task 100. Zero sorries, zero new axioms, full build passes.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for D4 soundness and completeness
